user.title: Add an Airmonitor App Extension
user.description: Enter the device's Wi-Fi MAC address. Auto-discovery via MQTT happens whenever the shim publishes a presence message to `qpext/<mac>/info`; this manual form is for cases when the device hasn't talked to the broker yet. With or without separators — e.g. 58:2D:34:70:A8:73 or 582D3470A873.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered Airmonitor App Extension

abort.already_configured: A device with this MAC is already configured.
abort.invalid_discovery_topic: The discovery topic is not in the expected qpext/<mac>/info form.

init.title: Airmonitor App Extension tabs
init.description: Tabs you create here show up on the device's PathView. Each tab is either a set of widget cards or a single RTSP camera. For every tab the integration also publishes a `Show <name>` button entity so the device can be commanded to switch to that tab from any HA automation or dashboard.

weather_menu.title: Weather feed
weather_menu.description: Push HA-sourced weather + ИКВ + УФИ into the device's stock weather widget by substituting Qingping's cloud `/daily/*` responses. Configured source: `{current}`. Don't forget to enable the **Substitute cloud weather data** switch on the device.

edit_weather.title: HA → device weather source
edit_weather.description: Pick a `weather.*` entity for current condition + temperature + forecasts (Open-Meteo works key-free); optional AQI and UV sensors fill ИКВ and УФИ. Leave fields blank to skip them — the stock widget will show 0 there. `City name` sets the small label above the temperature.

data.humidity_entity: Humidity sensor (optional, overrides weather entity's humidity)

add_tab.title: New tab
add_tab.description: A *widgets* tab holds any combination of sensor/switch/light/etc. cards. A *camera* tab holds a single RTSP feed (one camera per tab). Both types get a HA `Show <name>` button entity for tab navigation.

data.name: Name
data.icon: Icon for the Show-tab HA button

edit_camera.title: Camera for {tab_name}
edit_camera.description:
Current URL: {redacted}

Retype the full RTSP URL to change credentials; leave as-is otherwise. `width` is the JPEG width fed to the device — lower → faster encode. `fps` is the target frame rate.

add_entity_widget.title: New {widget_type} widget
add_entity_widget.description: Pick an HA entity, optionally label and icon. Appearance fields (sizes / colors) are optional — leave at 0 / blank to keep the widget's defaults. Colors accept `#rgb`, `#rrggbb`, or CSS names.

add_button.title: New button widget
add_button.description: A button widget calls a HA service when tapped. Data is an optional JSON object passed as service data (e.g. {"entity_id": "switch.foo"}). Appearance fields are optional.

events_menu.title: Triggers
events_menu.description: When an HA entity changes state (typically an `automation` firing), switch the device to a given tab.

error.data_invalid_json: Service data must be valid JSON.
error.data_not_object: Service data must be a JSON object (e.g. {"entity_id": "…"}).

republish.name: Re-publish dashboard
republish.description: Re-publish the current tab composition to MQTT (useful after the device was wiped or the broker lost its retained message).
